task_objective: Update build process to automatically push plugin zip to Steam Deck.
design_decisions: Added scp command to scripts/post_commit.sh to push the zip to /home/deck/Downloads/ on 10.168.168.20.
Added a ping check with a 2-second timeout to avoid long hangs if the Steam Deck is unreachable.
results: The plugin zip is now automatically pushed to the Steam Deck after every commit (via the post-commit script). Verified that the scp command executes correctly.
